'''Bothan Space''' was a [[sector]] of [[Realspace|space]] in [[the galaxy]]'s [[Mid Rim Territories|Mid Rim]]. It contained the [[planet]] [[Bothawui]], as well as [[Kothlis]] and [[Moonus Mandel]].

{{Sec-stub}}
